Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $334,580,976Details
International Box Office $544,271,773
Worldwide Box Office $878,852,749
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,273,879
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $52,811,688
Total $72,085,567
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, Peter returns home, where he lives with his Aunt May, under the watchful eye of his new mentor Tony Stark. Peter tries to fall back into his normal daily routine—distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man—but when the Vulture emerges as a new villain, everything that Peter holds most important will be threatened.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$117,027,503 (35.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$175,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,348 opening theaters/4,348 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $446,003,183

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 7th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
July 7th, 2017 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures

July 5th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, Peter returns home, where he lives with his Aunt May, under the watchful eye of his new mentor Tony Stark. Peter tries to fall back into his normal daily routine—distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man—but when the Vulture emerges as a new villain, everything that Peter holds most important will be threatened.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$117,027,503 (35.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$175,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,348 opening theaters/4,348 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $446,003,183
